_comment: New-from-Z-Man feed. For now this is maintained by hand. In a later phase, an automated monitor of the Z-Man new-products page will append entries here so the app stays current on its own. 'date' is optional (ISO yyyy-mm-dd) and lets the app sort newest-first.

newProducts.name: ChatterBait EVO
newProducts.description: Next-level bladed jig with a radical, unpredictable hunting action built for tournament performance.

newProducts.name: SWAG LT Swimbait
newProducts.description: Wide, stable swim on an Over/Under line-through harness; 10X Tough body slides up the line on hookset.

newProducts.name: PrawnstarZ
newProducts.description: Ultra-realistic shrimp action and 10X Tough durability to fool wary inshore predators.

newProducts.name: Gobius Swimbait
newProducts.description: Goby-profile bait made to last and made to catch — a smallmouth & bottom-feeder favorite.

newProducts.name: Graph ShadZ
newProducts.description: Purpose-built minnow profile for FFS — track and trigger suspended fish you see on the graph.
